summary: A solid soundboard capture with nice tone and standout China>Rider and Scarlet>Fire sequences, though one listener notes some tape whine.
review: The recording is generally praised for its clear sound and Willy's good work on the tapes, delivering a strong performance that includes a tasty Friend of the Devil and a snappy China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider transition followed by a fiery Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain. A minority of listeners complain about tape whine, giving the technical side a mixed rating.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is positively described (packed first set, solid second set) while recording quality receives both praise and criticism; the weighted average yields a mid‑high rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Listeners note a nice, clear sound and good tape work by Willy, but one reviewer mentions noticeable whine/tape hiss.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as packed with goodies, second set paced well with a snappy opening and strong transitions.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for getting into Friend of the Devil and delivering great tone.
